extracted_data.description:
Groww is India's No.1 Stock Broker, trusted by 4 Crore+ Indians. Open a free demat account and start investing & trading.


Groww is your one app to invest & trade in:

• Stocks

• Mutual Funds

• Futures and Options Trading (F&O)

• Gold and Silver

• Margin Trading Facility (MTF)

• Commodity Derivatives: Gold, Silver, Crude Oil, Natural Gas and more

• Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs)

• IPO

• Bonds

• API Trading

• UPI Payments


Reasons why Indians love investing on Groww

• Free demat account (Individual, HUF, Corporate)

• 0 AMC & no hidden charges

• 24*7 customer support


Stocks, ETFs, IPO, MTF & Intraday Trading

• Open a free demat & trading account in minutes

• Buy & Sell stocks listed on NSE & BSE stock exchanges

• Boost trades with up to 5X leverage on Intraday Trading

• Never miss any corporate actions like splits, dividends, bonus etc.

• Buy up to 4X more stocks with MTF (Margin Trading Facility)

• Explore fundamentals & financials of stocks like Angel One, 5Paisa Capital, Meesho, ICICI Pru, Vodafone Idea etc.

• Apply for upcoming stock market IPOs

• Add money via UPI options like Gpay & PhonePe, Net banking & more

• Trade using TradingView’s advanced charts

• Set alerts to track stock price movements for trading & investing decisions

• Trade smarter with Intraday Screener

• Set Target & Stoploss both with OCO order for Intraday Trading

• Get insights on your investing or trading portfolio’s performance, allocation, risk, dividends & XIRR with Portfolio Analysis


Mutual Funds Investing

• Invest in direct mutual funds with 0% commission

• Estimate portfolio returns with SIP calculator

• Track all your Mutual Funds investments in ONE place - Import & Redeem external funds easily

• Save tax up to Rs.46,800 with Tax Saving Mutual Funds (ELSS funds)

• Invest money via SIP or lumpsum in Mutual Funds offered by AMCs like Zerodha, SBI, Quant, Parag Parikh, Bandhan, HDFC, Motilal Oswal, Axis, ICICI Mutual Fund etc.

• Switch from one fund to another within the same fund house, without having to redeem it.


Futures & Options Trading (F&O)

• Track Indian & Global Indices like Nifty, Sensex, Nasdaq, Gift Nifty, Nifty Midcap, Nifty Next 50 etc to make informed trading calls

• Trade better in Futures & Options with Safe Exit, Advanced Option Chain, Instant Pledge etc

• Use advanced charts to invest smarter & make informed futures & options trading calls

• Super-fast Options Trading with multiple indicators & live portfolio overview

• Place Basket Orders with convenience during option trading

• Test your strategy with Payoff Graph & trade with confidence in futures & options

• Exit your F&O positions instantly in a click with Fast Exit


Commodity Derivatives Trading

• Trade in Gold, Silver, Crude Oil, Natural Gas, Zinc, Aluminium & Copper

• Trades executed in under 0.05 seconds for a smooth experience

• Pledge your stock holdings to boost your margin and take larger positions


Personal Loans

• Tenure: 3 to 60 months

• APR: 13-36%


Registered NBFCs & Banks (lenders)

• IDFC First Bank Ltd

• Aditya Birla Finance Ltd

• Kisetsu Saison Finance (India) Pvt Ltd

• Groww Creditserv Technology Pvt Ltd

Groww is the DLA for the above lenders operating the Groww platform & services therein with assistance from other LSPs


Example:

Tenure -12 months

Rate of Interest - 15% per annum

Processing fee - ₹1000 (2% inclusive GST)

Total Interest - ₹4156

EMI - ₹4513

APR -18.89%

Amount Disbursed - ₹49000

Total repayment amount - ₹54156


Groww Invest Tech Pvt Ltd

SEBI Registration no: INZ000301838

Member Code: BSE-6699  NSE-90187, MCX- 57420

Segment/s: Cash & FNO (Equity & Commodity Derivatives)

Privacy policy: https://groww.in/privacy-policy

Groww’s registered office: Vaishnavi Tech Park,South Tower,3rd floor,Sarjapur Main Road, Bengaluru,Karnataka-560103

Groww is India's No.1 Stock Broker in terms of active customers as per NSE data.

reviews.body: Best user interface And easy to use
My main investment app since i started investing. Happy with the experience.

Great app for Investment and trending.After using lot many app I found this one is more useful. My only suggestion is that there should be Tablets /iPad compatible App is required iPad specific app is still pending
Excellent and immediate execution of orders
Best interface and simple to use .
Grow is very User Friendly Mobile Application for Trading. also its Pre-Apply IPO Feature makes you one step ahead of other Application. Off Trading Hours we can book Order and they are placed easily

Grow is investor friendly particularly for those investors who have little or no knowledge about investing in stocks and mutual funds. The analysis of investments is helpful and provides insight into the investments vis a vis market position.
Worst app for trading… they buy even higher than candlea high… i have screenshots , i will send those tp sebi
Great experience using this app. The customer service is very responsive and professional. Whenever i had a query, it was handled quickly and efficiency.

Started investing cycle with Groww App, and dealt with equity, Mutual Fund and Bonds. Easy of processing ( both buying and selling) has been an enabling experience. Besides data analysis of portfolio has helped in planning and execution of investment strategies. Great.
Very easy to invest and track!
Interface is good and easy to navigate
Add SWP Calculator Below SIP Calculator
Elegant, but Simple interface! Apps very easy to use and manage local trades
Should improve in giving fresh position and charges on mtf should be charged by overnight wherein Groww is out of funds should be charged
Best trading app for beginners. It’s user interface is really smooth and easy to navigate
Very user friendly application for trading. Pocket investor
Very easy to use and charts are very friendly to understand.
Very easy to understand and easy for transactions
Easy to manoeuvre, and trade with useful and transparent , up to date information about the stocks !!
Best app to invest, easy and reliable
It’s very simple and easy app for investing ✨

Groww is an excellent trading and investment app, especially for beginners as well as experienced investors. The app interface is extremely clean, simple, and user-friendly, making investing stress-free. Opening an account is quick, and everything from stocks, mutual funds, ETFs, IPOs, and F&O is available on one platform. What I really like is the transparent pricing with zero AMC, fast order execution, and detailed stock & mutual fund information that helps in making informed decisions. The app runs smoothly without lag, and fund transfer & withdrawals are quick and hassle-free. Customer support is responsive, and regular updates keep improving the experience. Overall, Groww has made investing easy, safe, and convenient. Highly recommended for anyone serious about growing their wealth 📈
Kindly provide cagr for porfolio in on complete basis profit and loss regarding single scrip also be provided that one shokud know total profit from intial in singke scrio
Very impressive service and easy to use
Very bad app full of lag and glich
The app has a very good ui and all features are good and easy to access. It has multiple options of investments like stocks MF’s Bonds etc.. providing all in one option
Very user friendly and helpful. Really informative but plz brokerage charge mat badhana.
Have been using it since last 4 years now. and these guys have made things quite simple.
Very good and user friendly App for trading
We can not do instant withdrawals on this app nowadays
I am using Grow app for 3 years and I am fully satisfied.God bless Grow. Tum jug jug jio Maharaja
I’ve been using this app for last 4 years. It’s a wonderful app with very user friendly UI. Frequent updates makes the app even better. A must try app for all those who are interested in investments.
The app is user friendly. Lovely user interface and safe. Gives a clear picture about different funds.
Best trading app. It was very easy and accurate chart.
Groww is user friendly app with details about stock, company s performance, intuitive user interface.
Very user friendly interface, amazing features and fast execution.
I’m so comfortable using Groww app. It’s so cool, informative, getting time to time notifications and very easy to use.

Best part of this app is the user interface and ease of use
It seems the ui for iPad is not responsive at all, It creates huge confusion when we are looking for charts. kindly fix it ASAP as it is there in Android tabs already.
One of the best app for trading
Simple and easy to use app.
Has lot to catch up to zerodha in terms of features
Almost all in one and simple to use app to keep up with the market. We don't need anything else.
Great can be better but lacking in MF fumdamentals and detailed analysis of funds for which we need to switch to other sources. Think seriously and make good adition to make this great.
Good app . Clean and precise. Shows fundamental of funds.

Overall app is good and has a very simple ui and can be navigated by any user. The ncd bonds tracking are been not properly tracked in the application. If they can fix this part which will be really helpful to track all the investment
Its a bunch of features platform where you each type of investment and trading features.
Its feel good to grow with groww
Absolutely loving the experience since 2020. Need some goodies like initial years 😁

For withdrawal i can understand, you people take 3 odd days to reflect the payment in my groww app, Need to be seen and i need solutions for that In thins era we are doing thing like 70-80 speed

Kindly learn & invest wisely. You’ll enjoy using this App also earn.
